BareMetalMachineV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-owned bare-metal Mac allocation managed through the Compute API.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this BareMetalMachine resource. Use `compute.mountthor.com/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the BareMetalMachine in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the BareMetalMachine.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the BareMetalMachine. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

desktopSession.description: Browser desktop access contract per ADR 0014. Ships the credential-side fields only in this PR; access-broker / launcher / expiration fields land with their reconciler in a later phase under provider-neutral names.

credentialSecretRef.description: Reference to the Opaque Secret in the same namespace that the host-side bridge reads for the per-lease desktop password.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

failureMessage.description: Customer-visible failure message when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the BareMetalMachine.

FleetPolicyV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible FleetPolicy resource in the Mount Thor Compute API.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this FleetPolicy resource. Use `compute.mountthor.com/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the FleetPolicy in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the FleetPolicy.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the FleetPolicy. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

ImageV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible image available for bare-metal reinstall and VM workflows.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this Image resource. Use `compute.mountthor.com/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the Image in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the Image.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the Image. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

MachineClassV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible bare-metal hardware class that can be requested by BareMetalMachine resources.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MachineClass resource. Use `compute.mountthor.com/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MachineClass in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MachineClass.

VirtualMachineV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible VirtualMachine resource in the Mount Thor Compute API.

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the VirtualMachine in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: VirtualMachineSpec defines the desired state of a VirtualMachine.

items.description: VMPort specifies a port to expose on a virtual machine.

resources.description: VMResources specifies the resource requirements for a virtual machine.

status.description: VirtualMachineStatus defines the observed state of a VirtualMachine.

items.description: Condition contains details for one aspect of the current state of this API Resource.

lastTransitionTime.description:
lastTransitionTime is the last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.
This should be when the underlying condition changed.  If that is not known, then using the time when the API field changed is acceptable.

message.description:
message is a human readable message indicating details about the transition.
This may be an empty string.

observedGeneration.description:
observedGeneration represents the .metadata.generation that the condition was set based upon.
For instance, if .metadata.generation is currently 12, but the .status.conditions[x].observedGeneration is 9, the condition is out of date
with respect to the current state of the instance.

reason.description:
reason contains a programmatic identifier indicating the reason for the condition's last transition.
Producers of specific condition types may define expected values and meanings for this field,
and whether the values are considered a guaranteed API.
The value should be a CamelCase string.
This field may not be empty.

status.description: status of the condition, one of True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

failureMessage.description: Customer-visible failure message when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the VirtualMachine.

items.description: VMPublishedPort describes a customer-safe private access command for a VM port.

timings.description:
VMTimingStatus records the native VM lifecycle milestones used for latency
profiling and readiness gating.

info.description: Generated Kubernetes-compatible customer compute schemas. Do not edit by hand.

get.description: Lists bare-metal Mac leases in the tenant namespace, including lifecycle status and customer-visible allocation details.

parameters.name: namespace

parameters.description: Set true for Kubernetes watch semantics when the resource allows watch.
parameters.name: watch

parameters.name: namespace

delete.description: Deletes one bare-metal Mac lease by name and starts the configured cleanup policy.
